title: Dashboard v5 — Search · FAB Speed-dial · Stats Bar · Dynamic Seed
summary: Third sprint on Apr 17. Added global search overlay (⌘K shortcut, fuzzy block search). FAB speed-dial (+) replaces single idea button — opens to Idea/Decision/Block capture. Stats bar in All view shows total blocks/decisions/ideas/automations/projects/today counts. Block cards show decision+idea count badges. Session timer in right panel. North Star in right panel when project selected. capturedIdeas persist via localStorage. seedNewChat() is now fully dynamic — pulls live projects with North Stars, recent decisions, today's work. MCP: git_push and score_skills tools added. v5 snapshot saved.
decisions: Global search built as overlay (not inline) — keeps feed clean, ⌘K is familiar
FAB becomes speed-dial with + icon (not emoji) — rotates to × when open
Stats bar only shows in All-time All-projects view — avoids redundancy when filtered
capturedIdeas persisted to localStorage — survive page refreshes without MCP
seedNewChat() now dynamic — reads live data instead of hardcoded text
Decision/idea count badges on block cards — visible without clicking through
ideas: Mobile PWA install flow — show 'Add to Home Screen' prompt on first visit
Keyboard shortcut guide modal — show all shortcuts (?)
Export whole storyboard as markdown doc — for handoff or backup

title: Dashboard v4 — North Star · Skills Health · Canvas Live Times
summary: Second sprint session on Apr 17. Added North Star display to both canvas cards and project headers — every project now shows its measurable success statement. Skills view upgraded with library health bar (avg score, A-grade count, 'needs work' quick-filter). Canvas cards show relative timestamps for last activity. relTime() utility function added. score_skills.py now runs automatically after every MCP populate call. v4 snapshot saved.
decisions: North Star on canvas = small colored line under goal text (project accent color, italic)
North Star on project header = left-bordered callout block with 🎯 icon — stands out from desc
Skills library health bar shows avg/100, A-count, weak-count with one-click filter
score_skills.py wired into MCP populate tool — skills-data.json stays fresh automatically
relTime() handles both ms timestamps and YYYYMMDD integer formats
ideas: Progress ring / % complete per project based on northStar milestone checklist
Session timer in right panel — how long this session has been running
GitHub auto-push via MCP tool after populate — code always backed up

- North Star callout block in project headers (bordered, 🎯 icon)
- Skills & Memory northStar added to PROJECT_META

title: 💡 Skill Marketplace — curated skill packs for sale
summary: Most Claude users don't know what a good skill looks like. We curate, score, and sell them. Agency wants Facebook targeting? Buy the paid-ads skill pack. Real estate agency? Buy the property marketing bundle. Opero angle: sell curated skill packs per industry — verified, scored 90+/100, ready to install. Distribution: skill library built into Storyboard dashboard is the shop window. The inspector scores tell people their skills are bad — we sell the fix.

title: Version History — v1 → v2 → v3
summary: Three versions of the Storyboard dashboard built in a single sprint. v1: basic app shell + masonry grid. v2: UI redesign with dark theme + right panel rebuilt. v3: Canvas view, Decisions nav, Flag This Moment, Roadmap overlay, PWA.
decisions: Each version snapshot saved to versions/ folder before making breaking changes
Auto-screenshot via html2canvas on every MCP live block — no terminal needed
Version thumbnails generated with Python PIL as visual placeholders
ideas: Real browser screenshots via html2canvas when MCP server is running
Diff view between versions — highlight what changed visually

title: Dashboard v3 — OS/AI Mode · Decisions · Flag This Moment
summary: Major UI sprint. Rebuilt the dashboard to match the dark v1 vision: OS/AI mode toggle (white vs dark theme, persisted), time lanes (Today/This week/Older), period tabs that actually filter, FOCUS card in nav with pulsing dot, right panel as session summary (Seed Next Chat CTA + today's work + ideas). Added missing v1 sections: Decisions nav item with live count + decisions view, Files nav item, Flag This Moment button (captures timestamped snapshot to clipboard), Recent Decisions in right panel. MCP server wired: HTTP server on port 3847 receives auto-screenshots from html2canvas. Roadmap overlay CSS scaffolded. package.json module type fixed. Claude Desktop config snippet written with correct path.
decisions: OS Mode = white/light theme (default), AI Mode = dark theme — toggled in header, persisted via localStorage
No terminal ever — screenshots happen in-browser via html2canvas → POST to MCP HTTP server port 3847
Decisions and Files as nav items with live counts pulled from block data
Flag This Moment = timestamped context snapshot → clipboard, for mid-session handoffs
Period tabs filter the feed; time lanes (Today/This week/Older) show in All time view only
Featured blocks = most recent block from top 3 most active projects gets visual LATEST treatment
FOCUS card = most active project by block count, pulsing live dot
ideas: Canvas view — project card grid with files/ideas/decisions counts (still pending)
Roadmap overlay — View Roadmap button on project header (CSS done, HTML+JS pending)
PWA manifest for mobile home screen install
Version snapshot blocks with thumbnails in feed

title: 💡 Storyboard as open API layer — sits between all tools and Claude
summary: Storyboard becomes the middleware: Slack posts to it, Claude Desktop MCP writes to it, email hooks write to it. Open API means any tool can read/write context. Not a Claude product — a universal AI memory layer. The layer between where you work and where Claude thinks.

title: 💡 MCP scans skills folder — shows which skills each project uses
summary: MCP tool that reads .claude/skills/, maps each skill to projects. Shows gaps: tasks running without relevant skills.

title: 💡 Skills library under Prompts — browse, improve, activate
summary: Prompts section becomes a skills browser. See all installed skills, which projects use them, quality score. One-click to improve.

title: 💡 Skill recommender — flag tasks running without relevant skills
summary: Detect when work is being done without a matching skill active. Proactively suggest: this task could use the hh-seo-content skill.

title: 💡 Public skill library — scrape + curate all Claude skills online
summary: Scrape GitHub and community repos for skills. Searchable library. Auto-propose per project type. Opero product angle: sell curated skill packs per industry.

title: 💡 MCP scans skills folder — shows which skills each project uses
summary: MCP tool that reads .claude/skills/, maps each skill to projects by checking which tasks reference them. Shows gaps: tasks running without relevant skills.

title: 💡 Skills library under Prompts — browse, improve, activate skills
summary: Prompts section in left nav becomes a skills browser. See all installed skills, which projects use them, quality score each one. One-click to improve a skill.

title: 💡 Skill recommender — if a task runs without a relevant skill, flag it
summary: Detect when work is being done in a project area that has a matching skill not being used. Proactively suggest: this task could use the hh-seo-content skill.

title: 💡 Public skill library — scrape + curate all Claude skills on the web
summary: Scrape GitHub, Claude forums, community repos for skills. Build a searchable library. Auto-propose relevant skills per project type. Opero product angle: sell curated skill packs per industry.
